meta.title: How'd we do predicting 2023's spaceflight milestones?
meta.description:
On January 1st, 2023, I tweeted a set of polls and wanted to see how well we in the spaceflight community could predict what would happen in the year forward. Want to participate this year? Here's the links to 2024's poll! 
- https://x.com/Erdayastronaut/status/1741924066204782932?s=20

And here were last year's polls so you can play along and see how you did! - https://x.com/Erdayastronaut/status/1609557794650202112?s=20

Get your tickets for the first annual Astro Awards in Austin, TX - January 13th and 14th! - http://astroawards2024.com

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel and subreddit! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
